Container.Name: powder-hunter
Container.Overview: Automated powder day alerts. Monitors weather forecasts across ski regions, uses Gemini AI to evaluate storm opportunities, and sends personalized alerts to Discord.
Container.Description: Automated powder day alerts. Monitors weather forecasts across ski regions, uses Gemini AI to evaluate storm opportunities, and sends personalized alerts to Discord.

Config.Name: Gemini API Key
Config.Description: Get a free key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey

Config.Name: Discord Webhook URL
Config.Description: Discord webhook URL for storm alerts. Create one in Server Settings > Integrations > Webhooks.

Config.Name: Home City
Config.Description: Your home city (used for travel time and cost estimates)

Config.Name: Ski Passes
Config.Description: Comma-separated ski passes you hold: ikon, epic, indy, etc.

Config.Name: Preferences
Config.Default: Love powder days in the trees and open bowls
Config.Description: Freeform description of what you like (fed to the AI for personalization)

Config.Name: Remote Work
Config.Description: Can you work remotely from a ski town?

Config.Name: PTO Days
Config.Description: Annual PTO days available for ski trips

Config.Name: Min Tier for Ping
Config.Description: Minimum storm tier to get a Discord @here ping

Config.Name: Check Interval
Config.Description: How often to scan for storms (Go duration: 12h, 6h, 1h)

Config.Name: Monthly Budget
Config.Description: Monthly Gemini API spend cap in USD (safety valve)

Config.Name: Region Filter
Config.Description: Only check a specific region ID (leave empty for all)
